items.summary: Unify anniversary-year math in the backend so Dashboard anniversaries use the exact same rule as the Kartoteka parishioner card: anniversaryNumber must be computed as (targetYear - eventYear) (NO +1 offset), based strictly on the corresponding single sacrament year field (baptismYear/marriageYear/funeralYear). Do not return anniversaries where anniversaryNumber is 0 (i.e., when targetYear == eventYear).

Add backend support for filtering anniversaries by type for both paginated and PDF-export endpoints, so the frontend can request only: baptism, marriage, or funeral anniversaries for a given target year. The filtering must apply before pagination and must also affect totalCount/pageCount and PDF export contents.

Update the Dashboard anniversaries section to add a UI control that filters the anniversaries list by type (All, Baptism, Marriage, Funeral). The filter must work together with the existing year selector and pagination (changing year or filter resets to page 1). The displayed anniversary numbers must match Kartoteka card logic (current year minus event year).

Update the Dashboard anniversaries PDF export to respect the currently selected anniversary type filter (All/Baptism/Marriage/Funeral) and selected year, generating a document that contains only the filtered anniversary entries.
